springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.general_idea: Migrated JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update deprecated PageRequest constructor to the static factory method required by newer Spring Data versions.
Replace deprecated Sort constructor usage with the fluent Sort.by API introduced in newer Spring Data versions.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data Neo4j OGM annotations with the new Spring Data Neo4j 6+ schema annotations.
Switch from OGM's @GraphId to the new @Id and @GeneratedValue annotations for identity management.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replaced deprecated GraphRepository with Neo4jRepository to align with Spring Data Neo4j 6+ API.
Updated import for @Query annotation to the new package location in Spring Data Neo4j 6+.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update Spring Test context configuration to use JUnit 5 extension instead of JUnit 4 runner.
Replace deprecated Neo4j OGM template API with the new Neo4jClient API introduced in recent Spring Data Neo4j versions.
Adapt repository method calls to return Optional as required by modern Spring Data interfaces.
Migrate from the deprecated Neo4j OGM (Object-Graph Mapping) stack to the modern Bolt driver-based Spring Data Neo4j configuration.
Switch the configuration class inheritance from the legacy OGM base class to the new Bolt-driver compatible base class.
Remove the embedded/in-process Neo4j server bean in favor of connecting to an external Neo4j instance via Bolt.
Eliminate the OGM-specific SessionFactory bean which is no longer used in the Bolt driver architecture.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation.
Adjust argument order in assertions to match JUnit 5 API signature.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring context loading.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4 starter parent to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new framework version.
Define the target Java version as 21 in project properties to align with the migration goal.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
